title: Bright Urban Community Intelligence
scene_prompt: Cinematic documentary photograph of a vibrant Latin American urban neighborhood on a bright clear morning. A wide tree-lined avenue with colorful low-rise buildings in warm terracotta, yellow, and white. Young people walking safely to school along clean sidewalks. A community park visible with families and green space. Modern street infrastructure subtly present — smart light poles with small sensor packages, clean bus shelters, well-maintained crosswalks. The neighborhood radiates safety, civic investment, and community wellbeing. Composition uses left third as open sky and building facades for text overlay space, right two-thirds shows the active street life and park. Bright morning sun from the east casting warm golden light across building facades and sidewalks, dappled tree shadows on the ground. Shot on 35mm lens, f/2.8 aperture. Kodak Portra 800 film stock. Warm analog color palette — forest green (#0f4c3a) in tree canopy shadows, Safety Amber (#F4A261) in morning sunlight on building facades, Cyber Emerald (#00D1B2) on subtle sensor indicator lights. Fine organic film grain. Natural vignetting. Editorial documentary quality. The image feels like a community that is thriving — the viewer is inside a city where intelligence makes safety invisible and life possible. No typography, no logos, no words, no lettering of any kind, no identifiable human faces.
palette: forest green (#0f4c3a) shadows + Safety Amber (#F4A261) morning light + Cyber Emerald (#00D1B2) sensor accents
composition: Left third clear for text overlay. Right two-thirds active street life and park. Focal anchor at tree-lined avenue perspective vanishing point.
